case_title: CATHLEEN DAVETAS VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION, LTD. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL, (TRANSACTION ID # 37825122): PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR HANLEY, DEAN A AS ATTORNEY FOR DAVETAS, CATHLEEN INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO DEMOSTHENES DAVETAS, DECEASED

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, PAUL & HANLEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CATHLEEN DAVETAS - CIVIL. COUNSEL SUBMITTED A COPY OF THE FILED AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE COURT TO REVIEW. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTED PAUL & HANLEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CATHLEEN DAVETAS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. AN ORDER WAS SIGNED AFTER THE HEARING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Young S. Lee, Esq., of PAUL & HANLEY (510-559-9980, X-235), appearing for Paul & Hanley LLP

RULING:
PAUL & HANLEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CATHLEEN DAVETAS - CIVIL

Counsel submitted a copy of the filed amended proof of service for the Court to review. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and granted Paul & Hanley's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Cathleen Davetas. No opposition filed. An order was signed after the hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
